calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
TENTATIVE RULING: off calendar
EXAMINER: SEAN BANG

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jun-01-2026 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Oct-20-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Kurt D. Huysentruyt for petitioner Doreen Woo (via Zoom).

The matter was called for hearing on Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary.

The Court inquired whether there were any objections to the petition or the admission of the will. No objections were raised.

There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated July 6, 2025, is admitted to probate. Doreen Woo is appointed as the Executor with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. A status hearing for filing of a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is set for April 26, 2027, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204. If either petition is filed two weeks prior, no appearance is required on that date. Frank Mahoney III is appointed probate referee.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Aug-18-2025 Continued To Oct-20-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
